issues.display_title: Issue #4101: Update Stats Links to Use Whitelabel Domains for Agency Accounts
issues.main_description_html:
Description

  • GoThruMedia/GoThru-API-New#1450
    Backend changes have been implemented to allow Google Stats and TourMkr stats to be accessible via custom whitelabel domains.

the rule is:

  • https://gstats.co/stats_b3c5a32690225492598b809b4df92b92 -> https://www.virtuo-reality.com/stats-b3c5a32690225492598b809b4df92b92
  • https://stats.tourmkr.com/en2w23325f0ouqr2opna91n -> https://www.virtuo-reality.com/F1eJgWhHNA.en2w23325f0ouqr2opna91n

We now need to update the frontend UI so that the buttons directing users to these stats use their configured whitelabel domain instead of the default application domain. This UI change must be conditionally applied based on the user's subscription tier and domain settings.

Business Logic & Conditions
The link replacement logic should ONLY trigger if the user meets both of the following criteria:

  1. Subscription Tier: The account is currently on the Agency OR Yearly Agency plan.
  2. Configuration: The account has a valid whitelabel domain set up.

Acceptance Criteria

  1. For Agency/Yearly Agency accounts WITH a whitelabel domain: Clicking "Tour Stats" or "Google Stats" successfully redirects the user to the stats page hosted on their specific whitelabel domain.
  2. For all other accounts (or Agency accounts without a whitelabel domain setup): Clicking those same buttons redirects the user to the standard, default stats URL.
  3. The UI rendering and link replacement do not cause noticeable delays or layout shifts on the My Tours or Virtual Tour Manager pages.

Demo by Developer

2026-06-26.14-51-34.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #1450: Update Gstats Links to Use Whitelabel Domains for Agency Accounts
issues.main_description_html:
Description

Backend changes have been implemented to allow Google Stats and TourMkr stats to be accessible via custom whitelabel domains. Each whitelabel account has it's own domain.

the rule is:

  • https://gstats.co/stats_b3c5a32690225492598b809b4df92b92 -> https://www.virtuo-reality.com/stats-b3c5a32690225492598b809b4df92b92

API

GET /portfolios/gstats?cid=128158523644165989

We now need to update the frontend UI so that the buttons directing users to these stats use their configured whitelabel domain instead of the default application domain. This UI change must be conditionally applied based on the user's subscription tier and domain settings.

Business Logic & Conditions

The link replacement logic should ONLY trigger if the user meets both of the following criteria:

  1. Subscription Tier: The account is currently on the Agency OR Yearly Agency plan.
  2. Configuration: The account has a valid whitelabel domain set up.

Acceptance Criteria

  1. For Agency/Yearly Agency accounts WITH a whitelabel domain: Clicking "Tour Stats" or "Google Stats" successfully redirects the user to the stats page hosted on their specific whitelabel domain.
  2. For all other accounts (or Agency accounts without a whitelabel domain setup): Clicking those same buttons redirects the user to the standard, default stats URL.
  3. The UI rendering and link replacement do not cause noticeable delays or layout shifts on the My Tours or Virtual Tour Manager pages.

Demo from Developer

issues.display_title: Issue #1340: Migrate Get Product Price List for Tokens
issues.main_description_html:
Migrate this endpoint to the Domain-Based ADR architecture.

Endpoint: GET /products/token
Current code: Payment\Stripe\OneTimeController@getPriceListToken
Why it's simple: token + 1 price query

Category A — thin logic currently written inline in a large controller. Extract into Controller → Action → Repository with a DTO and exception mapping.

Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md

Note from Developer

Migrated to Domain-Based ADR (PR #1453). Controller → Action → ProductRepository with DTO + Payment domain exceptions; subscription gate and encrypted response preserved.

📄 Doc: https://github.com/GoThruMedia/GoThru-API-New/blob/main/docs/v2/payment/get-price-list-token.md

issues.display_title: Issue #1341: Migrate Get Public Canada Tax
issues.main_description_html:
Migrate this endpoint to the Domain-Based ADR architecture.

Endpoint: POST /v1/payment/public/tax-ca
Current code: Payment\Stripe\OneTimeController@getTaxForCAForPublic
Why it's simple: validate + tax calc + encrypt

Category A — thin logic currently written inline in a large controller. Extract into Controller → Action → Repository with a DTO and exception mapping.

Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md

Note from Developer

Migrated to ADR (PR #1454). Controller → Action → DTO; tax calc kept in legacy BillingClass bridge; InvalidCostException mapping; encrypted response preserved.

📄 Doc: https://github.com/GoThruMedia/GoThru-API-New/blob/main/docs/v2/payment/get-public-canada-tax.md
